name: Dart
description: Dart pistols launch slow, guided spikes that latch onto targets and detonate after a short delay. They typically cannot score critical hits and do not deal instant on-hit damage, but the tracking makes them dependable against fast-moving or flying foes. If no lock is found, shots can bounce and may still acquire a nearby enemy, helping keep damage output steady despite the slower feel.
notes: Some effects that rely on hit timing only count when the dart explodes, not when it sticks. In rare cases, unusual Hyperion part combinations can create non-elemental E-tech dart or spiker variants that behave more like explosive detonations and may appear visually atypical.
